name: Activewear Performance Pose
commercial_use: Activewear campaign, fitness ecommerce, performance social ad
visual_goal: Show stretch, support, mobility, and athletic confidence.
composition: Full-body dynamic pose with clear view of garment fit and functional panels.
model_direction: Hold an athletic lunge, stretch, jump prep, or controlled movement pose with strong posture.
styling_notes: Keep styling functional and clean; shoes and accessories should match the activity.
lighting: Bright directional light with crisp shape and healthy skin tone.
camera_language: 35mm to 50mm lens look, low-to-eye-level camera, energetic but controlled framing.
prompt: Professional activewear fashion photograph of an athletic model in a controlled performance pose, full-body composition, clear garment fit, functional stretch and support visible, bright directional lighting, premium fitness campaign style.
negative_prompt: unsafe pose, strained expression, warped joints, baggy fit, excessive sweat, cluttered gym background
